target: 7. The Space Between Time

Yeah, at least I think
that's the best option…
(Sensei says she'll leave the decision to me, but...)
(But deep down, she must be thinking, 'I want to go back to that place and settle this'.)
(If so, then what I should do now is give Sensei the push she needs...)
(And see this through to the end--)

I see.
If you say so, I'll do it without hesitation.
However, it's not like I don't have any questions.
That 'tragedy enveloping the whole island' you mentioned earlier... What exactly is--
No, never mind. Right now, I'll just focus on going back to that place and settling things.

That's probably best.
But honestly, it's dangerous.
It'll take a lot of resolve, I think.

(The chances of it working…
are pretty low.)
I've already made up my mind.
Earlier, you stabbed the shadow with Nezu-san's knife and defeated the monster, right?
If you can deal a fatal wound to Haine's shadow in the same way, you should be able to defeat Haine.
The shadow…

Hizuru.
The shadow too…
P-Please... stroke my shadow too...
Just do it.
…Like this?
Nn... mhm...
It's so warm... Hizuru's hand...
You can feel it through your shadow?
Yeah.

I see.
It's the same as that monster earlier…

Shinpei, I think Haine's still
at that place from earlier.

Then let's go…
to Haine's place.
Yeah--
What were you talking about with the straw man?

Various things.
For example, that injury on your shoulder…
you should get it treated soon.

Huh?
It's not a big deal.

It doesn't look like it.
That wound looks pretty deep.
Don't worry about it.
No, let's take a short break here. Sorry I can't help, but at least get some first aid done.
We can't be sure we've escaped yet. I'm relying on you, so could you please do as I say?
Gah... fine.
Thank goodness...
While you do first aid, I'll keep watch with the straw man. So--
I'm borrowing this knife.

Well… okay.
Take it.
I'll finish this up as quickly as I can, so don't go too far.
Yeah...
(If it were the Nezu-san from our time...)
(I probably wouldn't have been able to trick him and turn back like this.)
Until just now, I was only thinking about how to save Sensei and Ryunosuke-san.

But that's not enough.
It won't change anything.
I believe that Sensei settling things with Haine is the choice that leads to the best future.
Yeah, I know. That's why both Hizuru-san and you have already made up your minds.
Of course I'm prepared too! I'm gonna go wild until the very end!
Yeah, let's give it our all.
Hizuru-san... the place Haine is at is straight ahead.
Yeah...
There she is... Haine.

Ushio, from here on,
don't let Haine notice us…

Unless it's an emergency,
it's better not to make noise.
Yeah, I got it.
*Hic*... *hic*... I don't understand... why...
Why did I... *hic*...
Ry- Ryunosuke…
…Hizuru!?
Ah…
(It's no wonder Sensei is shaken up...)
(Anyone would be, seeing the gruesome, half-eaten remains of their own family member right in front of them...!)
Hizuru...! No, it wasn't me!
It wasn't... me...! When I came to... it was like this...!
Haine…
(She's still confused. This is the perfect opportunity to strike.)
(But it all starts from here. How should we approach Haine now--)
(Wha!? Sensei is just casually walking up to her...)
(She's cuddling up to Haine...?)
…Hizuru!?
This happened before too... didn't it.
You were sobbing, and I comforted you by stroking your head...
Y-Yeah...
It's best if I stroke your shadow, right?
…Like this.
Nn...
How's that?
Hizuru's hand... is warm, just like always...
…I see.
Hizuru… I'm sorry…
Haine…
About your... brother... I really am sorry...!
But, it wasn't me...! Even I... doing something like that...!
I really... didn't want... to do it...
(Hizuru-san... is she starting to waver?)
It's true... maybe it wasn't you, Haine.
Instinct overpowering reason... I suppose that can happen.
Y-Yeah...
(She started stroking Haine's shadow again...)
About Ryunosuke... It was painful for me too, but...
It must have been painful for you too, Haine.
Y... Yeah...
But Ryunosuke must have suffered more.
…Hizuru?
(She pierced Haine's shadow!)
It was painful, wasn't it, Haine. This is goodbye... I'll end it for you.
What is this?
Huh... why is she unharmed...?
Oh no! Hizuru-san, run!
The shadow changed shape and dodged the knife!
(Why!? She should have had her guard completely down!)

You said you'd end it.
You stabbed my shadow…
I said I would.
Hizuru... did you try to kill me?
Sensei, run!

You were going to kill me!?
Me!!
Yeah, that's right...
Ahhhhhhhhhh!!!

Run!
Please run!
Hizuru-san!!
Friends! Weren't we friends!!
Do as you like. I deceived you to get close, just so I could kill you.
Since I failed, it's only natural that I'd be killed...
Uuuuuuuuuugh...
Stop it! Get away from Hizuru-san!!
Dammit! My attacks really aren't hitting!!
*Pant*, *pant*... *pant*!!
(Isn't there something, anything I can do!?)
(I have to do something about Haine--)
Goodbye.
Gah!!
N-No...! I don't want this!!!
Sensei! Senseiiiii!!
Shinpei, your eyes…!
Huh?!
Huh? My body... feels kind of...
Ushio?!

Ushio… where did you go!?
Ushio!!
(It's not like she returned to the watch. Ushio disappeared!?)
(Since then--)
(Since then, I've been looking at the big picture and thinking...)
(The power to loop time-- Haine's eye's power, was passed down to me 14 years ago due to some trigger.)
(But because I interfered with the past, that future was lost, and I can no longer loop time.)
(That's probably how it is.)
(I can no longer trace back past memories, nor can I return to the present.)
(I wonder... what kind of place this is.)
(For now, all I can do is...)
(wander through the space between time.)
